item.title: Water Commission Regular Meeting - Cancelled
item.description: Water Commission Regular Meeting - Cancelled is scheduled for July 27, 2026 at 5:30 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.description: Junk Drop Off Event is scheduled for July 25, 2026 at 8:30 AM at San Jon Yard, 336 San Jon Rd Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for July 16, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.
